auto_approved.notes: Manual update from user screenshots for Aja House tarifs.
Manual update from user screenshots for Aqua by packs and weekly-commitment subscriptions.
Manual update from user screenshots for Ashtanga Yoga Paris pricing.
Operating as HOLD Studio. Validity measured in weeks.
Manual update from user screenshots: packs and memberships across 3/6/12 month commitments.
Manual update from Barreshape studio pricing page.

auto_approved.studio_name: Centre de Yoga Iyengar de Paris
auto_approved.notes: Manual update from user screenshots for Centre Iyengar pricing.
Grip socks required. Memberships include -15% on café and priority event access.
Mixed offering: aquabike, yoga/pilates, and EMS. Different pricing per modality. EMS discovery is refundable if purchasing a plan + outfit.
Separate pricing for Sessions (non-Reformer) and Reformer. Memberships include all sports + Reformer. Prices effective from 2 Jan 2025. Klarna available for 10+ packs.
Manual update from user screenshots: full tarifs, abonnements, and tarifs etudiants.
Complex pricing with separate tiers for studio (tapis), Reformer Solo, Reformer Duo, Zoom, and Mix Pass (credit-based). Cancel 24h before class.
Separate pricing for Yoga/Pilates Infratherapy and Reformer Pilates (Louvre only). Infratherapy uses heated room. Annual subscription available.
Manual update from user-provided KSport tarifs. Monthly forfaits include 49 EUR registration fee.
Manual update from user screenshots for Burning Bar packs and memberships.
Carnets sold at front desk. No online booking platform identified. Free trial available on request. All memberships sans engagement.
Manual update from tarifs page. Accepte Cheques Vacances et Coupons Sport ANCV.
Manual update from user screenshot: standard and reformer pricing grids.
Manual update from user screenshot: memberships with 6mo/12mo commitment and pack pricing.
Independent yoga teacher. Offers group classes, private sessions, and massage. Also teaches at partner studios. SAP-eligible (50% tax credit on private sessions).
International franchise. Prices listed as 'à partir de' (from). 4-week billing cycle for memberships, not monthly. Gloves and wraps included with trial.
Manual update from user screenshots for Atelier La Canopee; kids classes and VOD omitted per user instruction.
Locations in Boulogne, Paris 8, Paris 17. No memberships offered.
Manual update from user screenshot; visible pricing appears to be partial page capture.
Part of Monday Sports Club network with Dynamo Cycling and Punch Boxing. Credits valid across all three brands. Alma payment available for larger packs.
Part of Monday Sports Club network with Riise and Punch Boxing. Credits valid across all three. Alma payments available for larger packs.
Memberships listed as 'Bientôt disponible' (coming soon). Pack validity not stated on site.
Manual update from user screenshots: packs (valid 6 months) and membership 249 EUR/month (10 sessions), 3 months commitment.
Multi-location chain (7+ studios in Paris area). Cards valid across all Paris, Boulogne, Neuilly & Saint-Mandé locations. Grip socks required (30€).
No intro offers. No student/corporate discounts listed. Pack validity not shown on website; CGV say it's indicated at order.
No monthly membership for studio. Also offers Kalon TV (online) at 35€/month or 300€/year.
Manual update from user screenshot.

review_required.notes: Credit-based system for multi-activity cards. Small group sessions sold separately. No memberships. Sans engagement.
Manual update from user: in-person drop-ins 1h15=26 EUR, 1h30=27 EUR, 1h45=29 EUR.
